nodes.name: full_pipeline.rs
nodes.summary: Full pipeline integration tests verifying 10K perception events, syscall coverage, checkpoint/replay determinism, batch consistency and lifecycle states.

nodes.name: test_full_pipeline_10000_events
nodes.summary: Runs the cognitive pipeline with 10K events and validates event/vector/attestation counts.

nodes.name: test_all_syscalls_covered
nodes.summary: Asserts all 12 ADR-087 syscalls are exercised by the pipeline.

nodes.name: test_checkpoint_replay_determinism
nodes.summary: Verifies checkpoint and restart produce bit-identical final pipeline state.

nodes.name: test_batch_processing_consistency
nodes.summary: Ensures pipeline results are stable across different batch sizes with same seed.

nodes.name: test_deterministic_generation
nodes.summary: Two runs with identical seed must produce identical event counts and syscall totals.

nodes.name: test_small_event_count
nodes.summary: Confirms pipeline correctness across a range of tiny event counts.

nodes.name: test_feature_coverage_report
nodes.summary: Validates feature coverage report structure and overall coverage percentage.

nodes.name: test_witness_log_attestations
nodes.summary: Confirms each event produces at least one attestation in the witness log.

nodes.name: test_coordinator_timer_waits
nodes.summary: Verifies the coordinator performs minimum required timer_wait syscalls.

nodes.name: test_pipeline_lifecycle
nodes.summary: Walks the pipeline state machine through Uninitialized→Running→Completed.

nodes.name: test_pipeline_performance
nodes.summary: Measures pipeline throughput and asserts >100 events/sec.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the rvf-swarm-demo example crate; depends on ruvix-nucleus/types/cap/queue/sched.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Describes the RVF swarm consensus demo: agents, PBFT, capabilities and proof-gated vector stores on RuVix.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Multi-agent swarm demo with coordinator/validator/worker types using kernel queues, vector stores and proof emission.

nodes.name: SwarmMessage
nodes.summary: Inter-agent message variants: Propose, Vote, Commit, Execute, Result.

nodes.name: WorkerAssignment
nodes.summary: Maps a worker id to its assigned task slice range.

nodes.name: ConsensusState
nodes.summary: Tracks view, proposal id, collected votes and commit flag for PBFT consensus.

nodes.name: Coordinator
nodes.summary: Leader agent that proposes tasks, processes votes and emits commit attestations.

nodes.name: Validator
nodes.summary: Validator agent that votes on coordinator proposals with proofs.

nodes.name: Worker
nodes.summary: Worker agent executing tasks against the shared vector store with proof emission.

nodes.name: swarm_main
nodes.summary: Boots the kernel and orchestrates a single PBFT consensus round across coordinator, validators and workers.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Manifest for ruvix-qemu-swarm crate with qemu-swarm and swarm-monitor binaries; uses tokio, clap, crossterm.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Architecture, CLI and chaos-engineering documentation for the QEMU swarm simulation system.

nodes.name: 3-node-cluster.toml
nodes.summary: Minimal 3-node mesh cluster config with basic consensus, leader-failover and partition scenarios.

nodes.name: 8-node-swarm.toml
nodes.summary: 8-node mesh config with BFT, cascading-failure, partition-heal, slow-network and load-balancing scenarios.

nodes.name: single-node.toml
nodes.summary: Single-node debugging config with GDB enabled and guest_errors logging.

nodes.name: cluster.rs
nodes.summary: QemuCluster: multi-node cluster lifecycle, status tracking, console/network/orchestrator wiring.

nodes.name: ClusterStatus
nodes.summary: Created/Starting/Running/Degraded/Stopping/Stopped/Failed lifecycle states.

nodes.name: ClusterConfig
nodes.summary: Cluster configuration including topology, node defaults, overrides and multicast group.

nodes.name: NodeOverrides
nodes.summary: Per-node overrides for CPU, memory, kernel path and extra QEMU args.

nodes.name: ClusterConfigBuilder
nodes.summary: Fluent builder for ClusterConfig with topology/kernel/CPU/memory helpers.

nodes.name: QemuCluster
nodes.summary: Owns the QEMU nodes, virtual network, console aggregator and orchestrator for a swarm.

nodes.name: ClusterStats
nodes.summary: Snapshot of cluster status: node counts by state, topology and console stats.

nodes.name: config.rs
nodes.summary: TOML-backed swarm configuration types: SwarmConfig, NodeDefaults, NetworkConfig, scenarios and assertions.

nodes.name: SwarmConfig
nodes.summary: Top-level TOML config aggregating cluster, node, network and scenarios.

nodes.name: ClusterSection
nodes.summary: Cluster section with name, node_count, topology and startup delay.

nodes.name: NodeSection
nodes.summary: Wraps node defaults and per-node overrides.

nodes.name: NodeDefaults
nodes.summary: Defaults for CPU count, memory, kernel/dtb paths, machine and CPU model.

nodes.name: NodeOverride
nodes.summary: Per-node overrides keyed by index.

nodes.name: NetworkConfig
nodes.summary: Network section: base MAC, multicast group, MTU, isolation groups, latency, packet loss.

nodes.name: IsolationGroup
nodes.summary: Named subset of nodes sharing a private multicast group for partition testing.

nodes.name: TestScenario
nodes.summary: Named scenario with ordered steps and assertions.

nodes.name: ScenarioStep
nodes.summary: Action variants: Wait, Deploy, Fault, Broadcast, CollectMetrics, Command.

nodes.name: Assertion
nodes.summary: Typed expectation against scenario output (e.g. healthy_nodes=2).

nodes.name: consensus.rs
nodes.summary: PBFT consensus replica with pre-prepare/prepare/commit, view-change and checkpoint protocol.

nodes.name: Signature
nodes.summary: 64-byte cryptographic signature serialized as hex.

nodes.name: HashDigest
nodes.summary: 32-byte hash digest serialized as hex.

nodes.name: PbftMessage
nodes.summary: Request/PrePrepare/Prepare/Commit/Reply/ViewChange/NewView/Checkpoint message variants.

nodes.name: Request
nodes.summary: Client request with id, timestamp and operation.

nodes.name: PrePrepare
nodes.summary: Primary's view/seq/digest/request bundle that initiates a PBFT round.

nodes.name: Prepare
nodes.summary: Replica's matching prepare message.

nodes.name: Commit
nodes.summary: Replica's commit message.

nodes.name: Reply
nodes.summary: Client reply with execution result.

nodes.name: ViewChange
nodes.summary: Requests a new view; carries checkpoint and prepared proofs.

nodes.name: NewView
nodes.summary: Announces the start of a new view by the next primary.

nodes.name: Checkpoint
nodes.summary: Stable checkpoint with state digest used for log garbage collection.

nodes.name: CheckpointProof
nodes.summary: Bundle of 2f+1 matching checkpoint messages proving stability.

nodes.name: PreparedProof
nodes.summary: Proof of preparation: pre-prepare plus 2f prepares.

nodes.name: Operation
nodes.summary: Replicated operations: Noop, Read/Write KV, Execute, DeployRvf, VectorOp, GraphMutation.

nodes.name: OperationResult
nodes.summary: Success(Option<Vec<u8>>) / Error(String) for replicated operations.

nodes.name: ReplicaState
nodes.summary: Replica modes: Normal / ViewChange / Recovery.

nodes.name: LogEntry
nodes.summary: Per-sequence log entry tracking prepares/commits and committed/result state.

nodes.name: PbftConfig
nodes.summary: Replica config: num_replicas, replica_id, timeouts, checkpoint interval, watermarks.

nodes.name: PbftReplica
nodes.summary: Stateful PBFT replica driving consensus across sequences, views, checkpoints and view-change.

nodes.name: PbftStats
nodes.summary: Counters: requests processed, prepares/commits sent, view changes, checkpoints.

nodes.name: console.rs
nodes.summary: Aggregates and filters console output across QEMU nodes via Unix sockets.

nodes.name: ConsoleMessage
nodes.summary: Single line from a node with detected severity and category.

nodes.name: MessageSeverity
nodes.summary: Severity levels Debug→Info→Warning→Error→Panic.

nodes.name: ConsoleFilter
nodes.summary: Composable filter by severity, nodes, text, category and exclusion pattern.

nodes.name: ConsoleIO
nodes.summary: Console aggregator with per-node receivers/senders, ring buffer and stats.

nodes.name: ConsoleStats
nodes.summary: Aggregate console statistics: totals, per-node counts, errors and panics.

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: SwarmError thiserror enum covering QEMU, cluster, network, console, RVF, fault and config failures.

nodes.name: SwarmError
nodes.summary: Top-level swarm error variants with #[from] conversions for io/toml/json.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root re-exporting cluster/consensus/console/network/node/orchestrator modules and defining constants and prelude.

nodes.name: main.rs (qemu-swarm)
nodes.summary: qemu-swarm CLI binary providing launch/test/deploy/status/init/validate/topology subcommands.

nodes.name: Cli
nodes.summary: clap CLI root with verbosity flag and subcommand.

nodes.name: Commands
nodes.summary: Launch/Test/Deploy/Status/Init/Validate/Topology subcommands.

nodes.name: monitor.rs
nodes.summary: swarm-monitor binary: aggregates console output with optional crossterm TUI mode.

nodes.name: Cli (monitor)
nodes.summary: clap CLI for swarm-monitor with filter/pattern/output/TUI options.

nodes.name: MonitorState
nodes.summary: Per-node buffers and aggregate counters used by the TUI renderer.

nodes.name: network.rs
nodes.summary: Virtual network model with topology generation, MAC allocation, adjacency and isolation groups.

nodes.name: MacAddress
nodes.summary: 6-byte MAC address derived from node index using QEMU's locally-administered prefix.

nodes.name: Topology
nodes.summary: Mesh/Ring/Star/Tree/Random/Custom network topologies.

nodes.name: NetworkLink
nodes.summary: Directional link between nodes with latency, bandwidth, packet loss and active flag.

nodes.name: NetworkTopology
nodes.summary: Topology graph with adjacency matrix, links, BFS shortest paths and ASCII visualization.

nodes.name: VirtualNetwork
nodes.summary: Manages multicast groups and node-to-group mapping with partition/heal helpers.

nodes.name: node.rs
nodes.summary: QemuNode: spawns a single QEMU process, exposes monitor/console/GDB and lifecycle controls.

nodes.name: NodeId
nodes.summary: UUID-based node identifier with deterministic from_index constructor.

nodes.name: NodeConfig
nodes.summary: Builder-friendly per-node QEMU configuration: CPU, memory, kernel, MAC, ports, sockets.

nodes.name: NodeStatus
nodes.summary: Created/Starting/Running/Paused/Stopping/Stopped/Failed lifecycle states.

nodes.name: QemuNode
nodes.summary: Owns the QEMU child process and exposes start/stop/pause/resume/monitor APIs.

nodes.name: orchestrator.rs
nodes.summary: SwarmOrchestrator coordinating RVF deployment, fault injection, metrics collection and chaos scenarios.

nodes.name: FaultType
nodes.summary: Fault catalog: crash, pause, partition, slow network, packet loss, CPU/memory/disk/clock/data corruption.

nodes.name: DeploymentResult
nodes.summary: RVF deployment summary with successful/failed nodes and timing.

nodes.name: SwarmMetrics
nodes.summary: Aggregate metrics: per-node, cluster, and network.

nodes.name: NodeMetrics
nodes.summary: Per-node CPU/memory/syscall/proof/uptime counters.

nodes.name: ClusterMetrics
nodes.summary: Cluster-wide rollups: healthy nodes, consensus rounds and RVF components.

nodes.name: NetworkMetrics
nodes.summary: Network metrics: message counts, bytes, latencies, packet drops and partitions.

nodes.name: FaultRecord
nodes.summary: Record of an injected fault including injection/resolution timestamps.

nodes.name: SwarmOrchestrator
nodes.summary: High-level coordinator for deployments, fault injection, broadcasts, metrics and chaos runs.

nodes.name: ChaosScenario
nodes.summary: Builder-style chaos scenario combining a name, description, fault list and duration.

nodes.name: ChaosResult
nodes.summary: Result of a chaos run with timing, fault counts and captured metrics.

nodes.name: scenarios
nodes.summary: Predefined chaos scenarios: leader_crash, network_partition, cascading_failures, slow_network, byzantine.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml (tests)
nodes.summary: ruvix-integration test crate manifest with criterion bench harness and relaxed research-tier lints.

nodes.name: integration_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion end-to-end benchmarks covering cap-gated region access, queue IPC, slab cycles, perception pipeline and throughput.

nodes.name: lib.rs (tests)
nodes.summary: no_std integration test support crate exposing TestEnvironment, AttestationRecord and FNV-1a hash helper.

nodes.name: TestHarnessConfig
nodes.summary: Tunable limits for the integration test harness.

nodes.name: TestEnvironment
nodes.summary: Wraps a TestHarnessConfig for tests needing a controlled kernel environment.

nodes.name: AttestationRecord
nodes.summary: Region hash + operation count + checkpoint sequence used in Section-17 acceptance.

nodes.name: adr087_section17_acceptance.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-087 Section 17 acceptance: mount RVF, emit perception events, proof-gated mutation, attestation, checkpoint/replay and bit-identical state.

nodes.name: test_adr087_section17_full_acceptance
nodes.summary: Runs all six Section-17 criteria end-to-end including bit-identical replay attestation.

nodes.name: test_section17_criterion_1_mount_rvf
nodes.summary: Exercises mounting immutable and append-only regions with associated capabilities.

nodes.name: test_section17_criterion_2_perception_event
nodes.summary: Records perception events through region append and queue send.

nodes.name: test_section17_criterion_3_proof_gated_mutation
nodes.summary: Demonstrates a proof-gated mutation succeeding only when proof.verify() is true.

nodes.name: test_section17_criterion_4_verify_attestation
nodes.summary: Confirms attestation determinism over a stable region snapshot.

nodes.name: test_section17_criterion_5_checkpoint_restart_replay
nodes.summary: Captures state, restarts into a fresh region and replays operations to identical hash.

nodes.name: test_section17_criterion_6_bit_identical_state
nodes.summary: Two independent regions receive the same operation sequence and produce byte-identical state.

nodes.name: test_proof_rejection_prevents_mutation
nodes.summary: Invalid proofs leave region length unchanged.

nodes.name: test_capability_revocation_prevents_access
nodes.summary: Revoking root capability cascades to invalidate derived worker capabilities.

nodes.name: test_deterministic_hash_computation
nodes.summary: Verifies FNV-1a hash determinism across repeated calls.

nodes.name: syscall_flows.rs
nodes.summary: End-to-end syscall flow tests for region, queue, capability, slab, integration and error paths.

nodes.name: test_region_create_syscall_flow
nodes.summary: Simulates region creation with a root capability and READ check.

nodes.name: test_region_write_syscall_flow
nodes.summary: Verifies append-only region write after capability check.

nodes.name: test_region_read_syscall_flow
nodes.summary: Verifies immutable region read after capability check.

nodes.name: test_queue_send_recv_syscall_flow
nodes.summary: Exercises send/recv across sender and receiver capabilities.

nodes.name: test_queue_priority_ordering_syscall_flow
nodes.summary: Sends four priorities and verifies all messages drain.

nodes.name: test_capability_delegation_syscall_flow
nodes.summary: Validates grant() narrows rights to READ-only for the worker capability.

nodes.name: test_capability_revocation_syscall_flow
nodes.summary: Two-level delegation followed by revoke cascading to all derived caps.

nodes.name: test_slab_alloc_free_syscall_flow
nodes.summary: Allocates, writes, reads back and frees 16 slab slots verifying counters.

nodes.name: test_region_queue_integration
nodes.summary: Sends a queue message referencing region data and re-reads the region.

nodes.name: test_capability_gated_region_access
nodes.summary: Owner writes; guest gets read-only capability via grant; WRITE is denied.

nodes.name: test_zero_copy_descriptor_flow
nodes.summary: Builds a MessageDescriptor referencing an immutable region and validates slice contents.

nodes.name: test_invalid_capability_rejected
nodes.summary: Confirms a freshly created capability passes has_rights checks.

nodes.name: test_queue_full_rejected
nodes.summary: Sending into a full queue returns an error.

nodes.name: test_region_overflow_rejected
nodes.summary: Appending past region capacity returns an error.

nodes.name: test_multiple_tasks_queue_access
nodes.summary: Simulates two senders interleaving with one receiver draining all 20 messages.

nodes.name: test_multiple_regions_slab
nodes.summary: Verifies independent slab slots remain isolated across writes and reads.
